name: 斷指場景（極端犧牲的視覺衝擊）
name_en: Finger Cutting Scene (Extreme Sacrifice Visual Impact)
description: 養母當眾以斷指方式「償還」生育之恩，鮮血的視覺衝擊與母愛的偉大形成極強的情感震撼。
tags: 極端的肢體犧牲將抽象的母愛具象化為不可忽視的視覺畫面

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: Today I will use this knife to cut off one of my fingers to repay your family for raising me. ... Why are you doing this to yourself, Mom?
examples.context: 極端的肢體犧牲將抽象的母愛具象化為不可忽視的視覺畫面
